name: Kyogoku unyu shoji Co., Ltd
summary: Kyogoku unyu shoji Co., Ltd engages in the transportation business in Japan. Its business covers goods automated vehicle transport, cargo, petroleum-chemical-liquefied gas, harbor transport, clearance, warehouses, goods bales package, containers, shipping agency, human resources dispatch, and electric and other related businesses. Kyogoku unyu shoji Co., Ltd was founded in 1884 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
